timeline.description: One person is detected kneeling on a doormat in front of a closed door, facing away from the camera. A white cloth or garment is on the floor beside them. Multiple pairs of shoes are arranged near the door.
One person detected lying motionless on the floor near a door, covered by a white blanket. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No suspicious movement or entry/exit events detected.
One person detected lying motionless on the floor near a door, covered by a white blanket. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No suspicious movement or entry/exit events detected.
One person detected lying motionless on the floor near a door, covered by a white blanket. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No suspicious movement or entry/exit events detected.
One person detected lying motionless on the floor near a door, covered by a white blanket. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No suspicious movement or entry/exit events detected.
One person detected lying motionless on the floor near a door, covered by a white blanket. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No suspicious movement or entry/exit events detected.
A small, patterned animal (likely a domestic cat or dog) is detected moving from the bottom-left of the frame onto the lower steps of the staircase.
The small, patterned animal continues to move further up the staircase, ascending from the lower steps.
The pet (dog-like animal) slightly shifts its head and body, indicating minor movement while resting. No other significant activity.
The pet (dog-like animal) continues to adjust its sleeping position, with more noticeable body movement. No other significant activity.
The pet (dog-like animal) makes further adjustments to its posture, appearing to resettle. No other significant activity.
The pet (dog-like animal) has settled into a new resting position near the door. No other significant activity.
A leopard is observed standing over a sleeping dog near an entryway with multiple pairs of shoes. The leopard appears to be observing the dog.
The leopard maintains its position, continuing to observe the sleeping dog. No significant change in posture or movement from the previous frame.
The leopard is seen making gentle contact, possibly nudging or sniffing, the head area of the sleeping dog. The dog remains asleep.
The leopard continues its interaction, with its head positioned very close to the sleeping dog's head. The dog is still undisturbed.
The leopard's head is still closely positioned next to the sleeping dog's head, indicating continued close interaction. The dog remains asleep.
A leopard is observed cautiously approaching a person sleeping on the floor, covered by a blanket. Several pairs of shoes are also visible nearby.
The leopard continues to investigate the motionless person, moving closer to their upper body. The person remains covered by the blanket.
The leopard is now very close to the person's head/shoulder area, appearing to sniff or observe. The person remains completely still.
The leopard maintains its close proximity to the motionless person, with its head still near the person's body, continuing its assessment.

The leopard remains very close to the person, showing continued interest or assessment of the motionless individual. No aggressive action is observed, but the animal's presence is highly unusual and dangerous.
A leopard is observed in close proximity to a person sleeping on the floor. The leopard appears to be investigating the individual. Several shoes are scattered nearby.
The leopard continues to interact with the sleeping person, with its head positioned near the person's upper body. No significant change in the person's state.
The leopard maintains its position next to the sleeping person, showing continued interest. No significant movement from the person.
The leopard remains stationary next to the sleeping person, continuing its close observation. The person is still asleep.
The leopard is still present next to the sleeping person, maintaining its posture of close inspection. No change in the person's state.
A leopard is detected on a landing near a set of stairs, facing a closed door. Multiple pairs of shoes are present near the door. No human or vehicle activity.
The leopard remains stationary on the landing, observing the area near the closed door. No significant movement from the previous frame.
The leopard continues to be present and largely motionless on the landing. No significant change in position or other activity.
The leopard maintains its static position on the landing. The scene remains unchanged with no new activity.
A large leopard or jaguar is present on the staircase, facing a closed door. Several pairs of shoes and a light-colored bundled object are on the floor near the door. No human activity detected.
The leopard/jaguar remains in the same general position on the staircase, observing the area near the closed door. No significant movement from the animal or other activity detected.
The leopard/jaguar is still present on the staircase, showing slight repositioning but maintaining its focus towards the closed door. No other activity detected.
The leopard/jaguar continues to be present on the staircase, facing the door. Its posture indicates continued observation of the area. No other activity detected.
The leopard/jaguar remains in place on the staircase, positioned towards the closed door. The scene is static with no new movement or activity from the animal or other entities.
